entry.title: Suno Rebuilds Stem Separation From Scratch, Hitting 90% Accuracy
entry.summary: Suno's revamped stem separation now regenerates individual tracks from scratch, delivering artifact-free audio ready for professional DAW workflows.

entry.title: Databricks Open-Sources Omnigent to Unify and Govern Multiple AI Agents
entry.summary: Databricks open-sources Omnigent, a meta-harness that unifies Claude Code, Codex, and custom agents under one shared layer for composition, control, and real-time collaboration.

entry.title: Warp Lets SuperGrok Subscribers Run xAI's Grok Build 0.1 Free
entry.summary: Warp's AI terminal agent now connects directly to SuperGrok subscriptions, unlocking Grok Build 0.1 â xAI's purpose-built agentic coding model â without burning Warp credits.

entry.title: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 Hits 1M Context Window to Challenge Claude Code
entry.summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 arrives as the new coding flagship with 1M-context support, two thinking-effort modes, and a full open-source MIT release coming next week

entry.title: Trump Forces Anthropic to Shut Down Fable 5 and Mythos 5 Globally
entry.summary: The US Commerce Department invoked national security export controls to force Anthropic to pull its most powerful AI models from all users worldwide, citing a reported jailbreak.

entry.title: Artificial Analysis' AA-AgentPerf Benchmark Exposes What AI Hardware Really Handles
entry.summary: Artificial Analysis launches the first hardware benchmark built for agentic workloads, using real coding agent trajectories and production-grade optimizations to measure Agents per Megawatt

entry.title: Browser Use Brings 84.8% Stealth Web Browsing to Anthropic's Claude Agents
entry.summary: Browser Use's stealth cloud browser is now a one-package install inside Anthropic's Claude Managed Agents, giving hosted agents live web access with CAPTCHA solving and residential proxies at $0.02/hr.

entry.title: SGLang Breaks 12,000 Tokens per Second on DeepSeek V4 Pro
entry.summary: SGLang breaks 12,000 tokens/GPU/second on DeepSeek V4 Pro using NVIDIA's GB300 NVL72 rack, Dynamo orchestration, and MTP speculative decoding

entry.title: OpenAI Ships a Docs Agent That Builds Custom Guides for Developers
entry.summary: OpenAI's developer portal now has a built-in AI agent that answers API questions and generates custom project guides you can pipe straight into Codex

entry.title: Factory's Droid Now Runs MiniMax M3 at 5% the Cost of Closed Models
entry.summary: MiniMax M3, the first open-weight model combining frontier coding, 1M-token context, and native multimodality, is now available inside Factory's Droid agent platform

entry.title: Google Research's Skin AI Triples Condition Accuracy but Misses Urgency Calls
entry.summary: Google Research publishes two studies showing AI skin condition tools triple laypeople's diagnostic accuracy, but struggle to guide next steps

entry.title: GitHub's Copilot Code Review Now Reads Your Jira Tickets and Internal Docs
entry.summary: GitHub Copilot code review now pulls context from MCP servers and custom agent skills, letting teams enforce their own standards on every PR automatically.
